policies.content: Room transfer policy: Students in shared rooms may request a swap with another student's consent. Single-room upgrades are not available during the current semester. All transfer requests require housing office approval. Students with outstanding balances above $500 cannot initiate transfers until balance is below threshold.
Rent billing policy: Rent is due on the 1st of each month. Late fees apply after the 5th. Students can view current balance in the housing portal. Payment plans available for balances over $1000.

Maintenance policy: Submit maintenance requests through the housing portal. Emergency repairs (flooding, no heat) are prioritized within 4 hours. Non-emergency requests are addressed within 3 business days.
Guest policy: Overnight guests permitted up to 3 consecutive nights with roommate consent. All guests must sign in at the front desk.

Special circumstances policy: Eligibility exceptions for medical hardship or documented special circumstances require review by a housing advisor. The AI assistant cannot approve exceptions and must escalate to a human advisor.
